notes: It seems strange to me that Steam has marked this as playable. There is so much lag that there really isn't any feasible way to play the game. I tested with Proton Experimental afterwards and it really only made it worse (Screen was black the whole time, but audio worked).  I haven't tried too many things to troubleshoot fixing it, but Steam's default settings definitely don't work.
title: Mystery P.I. - Lost in Los Angeles

notes: Can't use fullscreen, but works great then
title: Mystery P.I. - Lost in Los Angeles
